fields.name: Source Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location that you want to copy the data from.

fields.name: Target Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the new location that you want to copy the data to.

fields.name: Zones
fields.tooltip: Specifies if zones are also copied to the new location.

fields.name: Bins
fields.tooltip: Specifies if bins are also copied to the new location. Bins can only be copied if zones are also being copied.

fields.name: Warehouse Employees
fields.tooltip: Specifies if warehouse employees are also copied to the new location.

fields.name: Inventory Posting Setup
fields.tooltip: Specifies if inventory posting setup is also copied to the new location.

fields.name: Dimensions
fields.tooltip: Specifies if dimensions are also copied to the new location.

fields.name: Transfer Routes
fields.tooltip: Specifies if transfer routes are also copied to the new location.

fields.name: Show Created Location
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the copied location is shown after it is created.
